message:
test(conformance): add Series.clip live oracle tests (5 cases)

Adds live oracle conformance tests for pd.Series.clip():
- clip_both_bounds: lower + upper
- clip_lower_only: lower bound only
- clip_upper_only: upper bound only
- clip_with_nulls: preserves NaN values
- clip_negative_bounds: negative bound range

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
